name: Spinach Bites
recipeIngredient: Reynolds Wrap Everyday Heavy Duty Foil
2 Packages (17 1/4 Oz. Each) Frozen Puff Pastry Sheet
1 Package (10 Oz.) Frozen Chopped Spinach, Cooked And Drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Line cookie sheets with foil and spray with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Thaw pastry sheets at room temperature for 20 minutes before unfolding.
4. In a bowl, combine spinach, Swiss cheese, onion, cottage cheese, breadcrumbs, 2 eggs, salt, and nutmeg.
5. Unfold each pastry sheet on a lightly floured surface and roll into a 12-inch square.
6. Place 1 teaspoon of the spinach mixture in the center of each square.
7. Beat together remaining egg with water.
8. Brush the edges of each square with the egg mixture.
9. Fold squares in half to form triangles.
10. Press edges together with a fork.
11. Place filled triangles on foil-lined cookie sheets and brush each with egg mixture.
12. Bake until golden brown and puffed, 12 to 14 minutes.
Makes 64 appetizers.
